mapper.select: SELECT address_id, civic_number, appt_number, street, postal_code, country, province_code FROM ebock.address WHERE address_id = #{addressId}
mapper.insert: insert into ebock.address (civic_number, appt_number, street, postal_code, country, province_code) values (#{address.civicNumber}, #{address.apptNumber}, #{address.street}, #{address.postalCode}, #{address.country}, #{address.provinceCode})
mapper.update: update ebock.address set civic_number = #{address.civicNumber}, appt_number=#{address.apptNumber}, street=#{address.street}, postal_code=#{address.postalCode}, country=#{address.country}, province_code=#{address.provinceCode} where address_id = #{address.addressId}
